sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100773" key="sunoi/dhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοίδ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n100773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swelling up together</tr_>, Mnesith. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:38:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.38.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
